---
title: "Cleaning_EDA"
author: "Charlotte Zhang"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: pdf_document
---
# Load packages and data
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(GGally)

load("datA.RData")
dfA <- datA
```
# Basic Structure
```{r}
# Dimensions
dim(dfA)

# Summary
summary(dfA)
```
# Convert variables to factors
```{r}
dfA <- dfA |>
  mutate(
    # Nominal variables
    menopause = factor(menopause, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("Pre","Post")),
    race = factor(race, levels = c(1,2,3,4),
                  labels = c("White","Black","Asian","Hispanic")),
    surgery = factor(surgery, levels = c(0,1),
                     labels = c("BCS","Mastectomy")),
    chemo = factor(chemo, levels = c(0,1),
                   labels = c("No","Yes")),
    hormonal_therapy = factor(hormonal_therapy, levels = c(0,1),
                             labels = c("No","Yes")),
    ER = factor(ER, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("Negative","Positive")),
    PR = factor(PR, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("Negative","Positive")),
    HER2 = factor(HER2, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("Negative","Positive")),

    # Ordinal variables
    tumor_grade = factor(tumor_grade, levels = c(1,2,3),
                         labels = c("Well","Moderate","Poor"),
                         ordered = TRUE),

    stage = factor(stage, levels = c(1,2,3),
                   labels = c("Stage I","Stage II","Stage III"),
                   ordered = TRUE)
  )
```
# Missing data check
```{r}
# Count 
colSums(is.na(dfA))
```
# Distribution of continuous variables
```{r}
# Histograms
dfA |> 
  select(age, bmi, tumor_size, lymph_nodes, Ki67, log_PFS) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything()) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()
```
# Frequency distribution of categorical variables
```{r}
plot_categorical <- function(data, vars, title_text) {
  plot_data <- data |>
    select(all_of(vars)) |>
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = everything()) |>
    group_by(name, value) |>
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    group_by(name) |>
    mutate(
      percent = count / sum(count),
      label = paste0(count, "\n(", round(percent * 100, 1), "%)"),
      max_count = max(count)
    )
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = value, y = count)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
    geom_text(
      data = subset(plot_data, count >= max_count * 0.4),
      aes(label = label),
      vjust = 1.2,
      color = "white",
      size = 3
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = subset(plot_data, count < max_count * 0.4),
      aes(label = label),
      vjust = -0.4,
      color = "black",
      size = 3
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      x = "Category",
      y = "Count",
      title = title_text
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

vars1 <- c("stage", "tumor_grade", "ER", "PR", "HER2")
vars2 <- c("race", "menopause", "chemo", "hormonal_therapy", "surgery")

plot_categorical(dfA, vars1, "Distribution of Categorical Variables")
plot_categorical(dfA, vars2, "Distribution of Categorical Variables Cont.")
```
# Relationship with response variable
```{r}
# Cateforical
dfA |>
  select(log_PFS, stage, tumor_grade, ER, PR, HER2,
         chemo, hormonal_therapy, surgery, menopause) |>
  mutate(across(-log_PFS, as.character)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -log_PFS) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value, y = log_PFS)) +
  
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue") +
  
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_x", ncol = 5) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Category",
    y = "log_PFS",
    title = "Association Between Categorical Variables and log_PFS"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Continuous
dfA |>
  select(log_PFS, age, bmi, tumor_size, lymph_nodes, Ki67) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -log_PFS) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value, y = log_PFS)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Value",
    y = "log_PFS",
    title = "Association Between Continuous Variables and log_PFS"
  )
```
# Correlation Check (Continuous)
```{r}
cont_vars <- dfA |>
  select(age, bmi, tumor_size, lymph_nodes, Ki67, log_PFS)

cor(cont_vars, use = "complete.obs")
```

# Handle Skewness
```{r}
# Log transform lymph_nodes
dfA <- dfA |>
  mutate(
    lymph_nodes_log = log(lymph_nodes + 1)
  )
dfA |>
  select(lymph_nodes, lymph_nodes_log) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything()) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)),
                 binwidth = 0.2,
                 fill = "steelblue",
                 color = "black") +
  geom_density(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Before vs After Log Transformation")
```

# Train Test Split
```{r}
set.seed(1)

train_index <- createDataPartition(dfA$log_PFS, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train_data <- dfA[train_index, ]
test_data  <- dfA[-train_index, ]
```

# SAVE
```{r}
save(train_data, test_data, file = "clean_datA.RData")
```
